_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: Examination of these mutations in the Catalogue of Somatic Mutations in Cancer (COSMIC, Wellcome Trust Sanger Institute, United Kingdom) revealed that each of these mutations occur in diverse human cancers
details: Successfully used to validate that identified Trp53 mutations occur in diverse human cancers, confirming clinical relevance of the mouse model findings
